---
title: "El Paso Crime Lab"
description: "Providing evidence-based research on crime and public safety in the borderland."
favicon: about_logo.png
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 280px
      body-width: 780px
    toc: false
---

<style>

/* Hide default title */
.quarto-title-block {
  display: none;
}


/* HERO SECTION */
.hero {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 4rem 1rem 2.5rem 1rem;
}

/* Logo styling */
.hero img {
  width: 380px;
  max-width: 90%;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

/* Title feel (in case you ever add text) */
.hero h1 {
  font-size: 2.6rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  color: #111827;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

/* Subtitle / intro text */
.hero p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: #4b5563;
  max-width: 650px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Content section spacing */
.content {
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

/* Subtle divider */
hr {
  border: none;
  height: 1px;
  background: #e5e7eb;
  margin: 2.5rem 0;
}

</style>

<div class="hero">

<p>
  <img src="about_logo.png" alt="El Paso Crime Lab Logo">
</p>

<p>
The El Paso Crime Lab is an independent research organization focused on crime and public safety in the El Paso region. Our goal is to produce evidence-based research that increases community capacity to diagnose and respond to criminal justice-related issues.
</p>

</div>
